title: Strive Soars 12%, Bitmine Jumps 5% as Bitcoin and Ethereum’s Surge Lifts the Crypto Proxy Trade
description: Strive (NASDAQ:ASST) stock is up 13% in Friday afternoon trading while Bitmine Immersion Technologies (NYSE:BMNR) shares are up 5%, as a broad crypto rally sends both names sharply higher. The catalyst is clear: Bitcoin (CRYPTO:BTC) is up 5% over the past 24 hours, trading near $77,800, while Ethereum (CRYPTO:ETH) has surged 5.5% to $2,444. Both ... Strive Soars 12%, Bitmine Jumps 5% as Bitcoin and Ethereum’s Surge Lifts the Crypto Proxy Trade

title: Ripple (XRP) Leads Weekly Crypto Gains as Altcoins Outperform Bitcoin
description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has been the best-performing major crypto this week, rallying around 10% from $1.33 to $1.50 while Bitcoin gained roughly 7% and Ethereum rose about 9%. For the first time in months, XRP is leading the market rather than following it. Right now, investors are beginning to bet on XRP over leading cryptos ... Ripple (XRP) Leads Weekly Crypto Gains as Altcoins Outperform Bitcoin
